review_text:
Excellent stay, very enjoyable. Hosts are fabulously country folk friendly. We based ourselves here for 7 days as it is central to the lower Yorks, taking a picnic lunch on our day trips along the beautiful coast.
Small but neat caravan & cabins park walking diatance to shops.
Loved our time here.

Great small caravan park clean and well looked after, manager Gary very helpfull and able to provide information as to what to see and where to go stayed for 5 days and enjoyed  it tremendously so go and stay and support

We stayed 2 nights which was plenty. We had a cabin.  Very small.  Reception was not manned when we arrived as it was a Saturday ( fair enough). They knew the time we were arriving but it took nearly 30mins before they got in touch with me letting me know check in procedures.  The key was in the cabin which was unlocked.  Would have been easy for them to email or message me this information! The cost was ridiculous! $180/ night. (Vans pay $25/night). I knew that but was expecting far, far better than what we got for that price.  Very disappointing stay. Would not recommend staying here in the cabins!
Neat caravan park, amenities were spotless and staff very helpful highly recommended, Yorketown is very nice place
A great caravan park to explore the southern Yorke Peninsula from. Its close to town,  very quiet, amenities were spotless and staff extremely friendly. We really enjoyed our week

Re reviewing.  This would be our 9th visit to this caravan park and we'll keep coming back :)

Stayed here a couple of times during peak times Christmas and Easter and it's pretty peaceful as it isn't one of those beach side caravan parks.In saying that you aren't far from the beach side towns either. Management when we have stayed them have been very accommodating to us.
This was a great park located close to a lot of great beaches!! Gary was super helpful and made us feel welcome. Would definitely recommend!

Such a lovely quiet park so clean in all amenities Gary was so friendly and made sure we had everything we needed including a tv antenna we ended up staying extra days a great base camp to visit all places around us thankyou we loved staying here ten out of ten Kerry and Shaun from albury nsw

Great quiet park, spacious sites, excellent showers and very clean. Owners friendly and in particular Gary checked in often and had heaps of local knowledge, Champ! Don’t miss out on a snitty across the road. Close to everywhere. Highly recommend!
Great centrally located CP to spend a few nights whilst exploring this part of the Lower Yorke peninsula

8 months ago, I gave the following review: Cabin was very clean and well kept. Grounds were tidy and well looked after.
Today was the total turnaround with cabin. Cutlery was all dirty with what looked like insect droppings in draw. Coffee cups in cupboard with lip marks, drips, and coffee stains in the bottom. There were coffee sachets but not any milk products you usually see in the fridge, so unless you drink black coffee, it was pointless. And the fridge was disgustingly dirty, bad enough we didn't dare put any food in their overnight. I have stayed at this park over a dozen times in the last 9 years, but I am rethinking for future visits.

Small caravan park,  kitchen area could do with a facelift.
Equipment there, was a small hot plate  microwave, and I think a toaster. Sink for washing dishes. Two toilets  and two showers, But. OMG, the showers were amazing. The best ones we've come across in a caravan park, It was hard to finish having    my shower.

Great small caravan park in a central position of lower Yorke Peninsula.Gary the caretaker is an excellent host, never had better, he invited us to the adjacent bowls club on the Thursday night for an excellent dinner, even took one of our group fishing one afternoon.There is a nice cafe and a bakery in walking distance, a friendly small country town worth a visit.
Had a great 3 day stay. Friendly with good amenities.
Good little park. Grass camping spots, excellent amenities. Easy walk into town. Book ahead.
Great little park, walking distance to shops
Very accommodating staff.
Small homely park good for a couple of days. Park manager friendly helpful and accommodating. Sites are a little compact for larger vans. Amenities clean and tidy.

Absolutely Fantastic park. Pristine Grass sites, rose gardens, plenty of trees, shower and toilets were always sparkling clean and smelt great. Gary is a character and is always up for a chat and advice on where to go! We had 5 days here and explored the whole lower part of the YP. So good after a day of exploring the beaches to come back and have an awesome shower!  Nels cafe for coffee and The pub for an great chicken schnitty. They all allow dogs!!! Thanks Yorke Peninsula for showing us a great time. Thanks Gary and hope your daughter recovers well Crystal 🥰
Amanda, Brad, Onyx & Sparkie

Lovely quiet caravan park, one of those secret places you really shouldn't share!!!! Clean, neat, and staff went out of their way to make you feel at home. Only hiccup was a fall in the camp kitchen necessitating a trip to hospital for check-up. Result of uneven pavers (rainwater subsidence) leading to tripping hazard. (lawyers litigation lot!). Staff went out of their way with 'duty of care' so despite the minidrama we will return.
Great Park. Beautiful grassy site. Amenities immaculate. Gary the host was super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend.  Pam and Mal

Stayed at Yorketown Caravan Park for 3 nights. Was such a lovely little spot to stay and explore around the Yorke Peninsula and VERY affordable for a grass powered site. The sites were well looked after and private. The bathrooms were very clean and well kept. Would definitely stay there again :)
Friendly and accommodating owners, quiet little park.

If you want a quiet and relaxing holiday this is the place. Crystal, Shane and Gary are so welcoming and made my holiday very enjoyable. Met some wonderful people at the park.
Shower amenities are very clean and tidy.
( best showers ever )
Very dog friendly.
The camp kitchen can do with a little upgrade (no hot water)
I had such a wonderful time that I booked in again next year.
See you soon Yorketown

People this little park is a must stay. Awesome people Crystal, Shane & Gary. Amenities very clean and nice lawns. The only thing I can fault is the kitchen. This day and age you would think hot water would be a must and maybe a bit of a revamp wouldn’t go astray. But people don’t let this stop you going. Very central to beautiful beaches and lots to see and do. 10/10 from us.
Mike & Kai.
The guys in the office couldn’t have been more helpful. Small park but clean and tidy. Would 100% definitely revisit. I’m
Easy caravan park to find, very tidy, friendly staff and the amenities were spotless

Best caravan park we have stayed in for along while. Amenities very clean. Gary and Shane are very friendly and helpful. Small park, nicely kept gardens and a short walk in to the town. Do yourself a favour and base yourself here to look around The Yorke Peninsula.  Thanks Shane n Gary n Jock.
Really nice C/P...caretakers very helpful.  Good place to explore "the boot" from.
